summary: M476 — stats fixes + tooltips + uniques + bosses + RELEASE_FAST. Slot dropdown refreshes on cloud load. damageTaken now actually records (was 0 for everyone). Overview tab adds Damage Taken + Healing charts. .ev-tooltip-card portaled to body (escapes .ev-hud stacking). Hover tooltip on enemies + companions showing statuses + blue-name modifiers. Unique items had no dmg/armor stats — now baked at gen time (auto-equip works, tooltips show damage). Bosses no longer double-scaled (hardcoded 2.5x boost removed). RELEASE_FAST=1 mode added — this very release uses it.
